title: New Whistleblower Reveals Encounter in James Fox's The Program
summary: A brief interview segment discussing a whistleblower account featured in James Fox's documentary 'The Program,' involving a face-to-face encounter with a being described as having no ears. The witness account includes corroborating details such as names of military personnel, location, and date.

key_claims.claim: A whistleblower had a face-to-face encounter with a being that had no ears
There are names of other on-duty military personnel who can corroborate the encounter
There is a specific location and date for the encounter
